description: Use this blueprint to turn AI and cyber control requirements into an evidence-backed readiness pack your team can review before audit or launch.
name: AI Control Readiness Assistant

product.agent_role: AI, cyber, and control readiness agent.
product.benefit: This is a durable TrustOps workflow for regulated AI and cyber adoption because evidence collection, risk scoring, remediation, and audit trails recur continuously.
product.customizable_for: AI governance, cyber readiness, cloud change assurance, ERP controls, RMF/ATO preparation, and operational control advisory.
product.customize: Replace the mock controls with AI governance, cyber, cloud, ERP, NIST, ISO, SOC, HIPAA, RMF, or internal framework controls and connect evidence from GRC, IAM, audit, ticketing, and vendor systems.
product.example: A synthetic GenAI claims assistant readiness packet maps policy requirements to evidence, identifies missing controls, scores readiness, and generates an audit evidence package.
product.how_it_works: A synthetic GenAI claims assistant readiness packet maps policy requirements to evidence, identifies missing controls, scores readiness, and generates an audit evidence package.
product.input: Replace the mock controls with AI governance, cyber, cloud, ERP, NIST, ISO, SOC, HIPAA, RMF, or internal framework controls and connect evidence from GRC, IAM, audit, ticketing, and vendor systems.
product.investor: This is a durable TrustOps workflow for regulated AI and cyber adoption because evidence collection, risk scoring, remediation, and audit trails recur continuously.
product.one_line: Use this blueprint to turn AI and cyber control requirements into an evidence-backed readiness pack your team can review before audit or launch.
product.output: Compliance gap report with control matrix, risk register, remediation plan, audit evidence package, and executive risk summary.
product.problem: Regulated companies need to prove that AI, cyber, cloud, ERP, or operational changes are safe, compliant, auditable, and controlled.
product.simulation_type: Risk, compliance, and control readiness workflow.
product.target_users: Financial services, healthcare, aerospace, defense, public sector contractors, enterprise AI, and cybersecurity teams.

description: Use this blueprint to turn messy discovery notes into a board-ready AI strategy recommendation with priorities, risks, and next steps.
name: AI Strategy Advisory Assistant

product.agent_role: Strategy discovery and board recommendation agent.
product.benefit: This compresses the strategy-discovery layer below senior expert judgment and can become a consulting discovery workbench for enterprise and PE transformation teams.
product.customizable_for: Enterprise strategy, private-equity value creation, CFO transformation, corporate development, and transformation-office discovery.
product.customize: Replace the mock packet with client documents, transcripts, financial tables, process maps, policy repositories, and market research notes; tune theme clustering, roadmap workstreams, and report language.
product.example: A synthetic industrial client packet flows through document reading, meeting summarization, benchmark synthesis, spreadsheet profiling, opportunity mapping, slide outlining, and roadmap generation.
product.how_it_works: A synthetic industrial client packet flows through document reading, meeting summarization, benchmark synthesis, spreadsheet profiling, opportunity mapping, slide outlining, and roadmap generation.
product.input: Replace the mock packet with client documents, transcripts, financial tables, process maps, policy repositories, and market research notes; tune theme clustering, roadmap workstreams, and report language.
product.investor: This compresses the strategy-discovery layer below senior expert judgment and can become a consulting discovery workbench for enterprise and PE transformation teams.
product.one_line: Use this blueprint to turn messy discovery notes into a board-ready AI strategy recommendation with priorities, risks, and next steps.
product.output: Board-ready recommendation packet with summary, issue tree, opportunity map, roadmap, slide outline, and evidence appendix.
product.problem: Companies spend weeks collecting documents, interviewing teams, summarizing findings, and building first-draft strategy recommendations.
product.target_users: Large enterprise strategy, CFO, corporate development, private-equity operating, and transformation-office teams.

description: Use this blueprint to compare local flood mitigation plans as rainfall, water levels, pump capacity, and vulnerable assets change.
name: Climate Resilience Planning Assistant

product.benefit: Climate adaptation budgets are growing, and this blueprint shows a credible planning engine for local infrastructure decisions.
product.customizable_for: Cities, utilities, campuses, hospitals, industrial sites.
product.customize: Replace synthetic weather with forecasts, flood maps, asset inventories, pump telemetry, road networks, and local cost assumptions.
product.example: Rainfall intensifies in Riverton, flood levels rise, and the advisor chooses pumps, sandbags, or road closures.
product.how_it_works: Rainfall intensifies in Riverton, flood levels rise, and the advisor chooses pumps, sandbags, or road closures.
product.input: Replace synthetic weather with forecasts, flood maps, asset inventories, pump telemetry, road networks, and local cost assumptions.
product.investor: Climate adaptation budgets are growing, and this blueprint shows a credible planning engine for local infrastructure decisions.
product.one_line: Use this blueprint to compare local flood mitigation plans as rainfall, water levels, pump capacity, and vulnerable assets change.
product.output: Local climate mitigation plan with ranked assets.
product.problem: Climate events unfold over time and stress infrastructure unevenly; static risk maps do not recommend operational mitigations during a scenario.
product.simulation_type: Weather, flooding, and infrastructure vulnerability simulation.
product.target_users: Municipal resilience teams, infrastructure planners, utilities, and climate-risk analysts.

description: Use this blueprint to see how compressed agent memory helps teams analyze large codebases without flooding every worker with full repository context.
name: Codebase Context Memory Analysis Assistant

product.agent_role: Repo architect, dependency mapper, risk classifier, context compressor, briefing author.
product.benefit: Large-repo code analysis is a high-value enterprise workflow where memory quality directly affects latency, cost, confidence, and auditability.
product.customizable_for: Architecture review, codebase onboarding, migration planning, technical due diligence, and large-repo code review.
product.customize: Replace the Django tree fixture with another repository, tune fixture_max_files, adjust token budgets, and add organization-specific risk policies or source categories.
product.example: A metadata-only Django tree fixture seeds hundreds of code facts and generated notes; agents compress them into an architecture briefing with source refs intact.
product.how_it_works: A metadata-only Django tree fixture seeds hundreds of code facts and generated notes; agents compress them into an architecture briefing with source refs intact.
product.input: Replace the Django tree fixture with another repository, tune fixture_max_files, adjust token budgets, and add organization-specific risk policies or source categories.
product.investor: Large-repo code analysis is a high-value enterprise workflow where memory quality directly affects latency, cost, confidence, and auditability.
product.one_line: Use this blueprint to see how compressed agent memory helps teams analyze large codebases without flooding every worker with full repository context.
product.output: Compressed code-analysis handoff, final architecture briefing, and context-memory benchmark report.
product.problem: Large codebases produce more facts than an LLM can safely carry; Membrane working memory must preserve source refs, subsystem boundaries, pinned repo facts, and private review notes under tight context budgets.
runtime_features: token, latency, quality, and privacy telemetry
product.target_users: Engineering leaders and platform teams evaluating memory systems for code analysis agents.

description: Use this blueprint to model buyer-supplier negotiation rounds and compare offers as demand, price, and capacity change.

description: Use this blueprint to understand how a closed-loop agent observes changing work, decides on each tick, and leaves an inspectable action trail.
name: Demo: Closed Loop Agent Runtime

product.benefit: This is the smallest proof of the platform thesis: agents reason inside systems, not outside them.
product.customizable_for: Support queues, claim processing, review pipelines, fulfillment operations.
product.customize: Replace queue metrics with your workflow KPIs, add actions, change the scoring heuristic, and connect the final artifact to a dashboard.
product.example: A work queue grows, capacity and quality drift, and an operations agent chooses whether to add capacity, protect quality, or hold policy.
product.how_it_works: A work queue grows, capacity and quality drift, and an operations agent chooses whether to add capacity, protect quality, or hold policy.
product.input: Replace queue metrics with your workflow KPIs, add actions, change the scoring heuristic, and connect the final artifact to a dashboard.
product.investor: This is the smallest proof of the platform thesis: agents reason inside systems, not outside them.
product.one_line: Use this blueprint to understand how a closed-loop agent observes changing work, decides on each tick, and leaves an inspectable action trail.
product.output: Simulation summary with action history, state deltas, and next steps.
product.problem: Most LLM demos stop after one answer; real operations require repeated observations, decisions, state updates, and traceable outcomes.
product.target_users: Developers, evaluators, and technical buyers learning the closed-loop agent model.

description: Use this blueprint to test and demo advanced cluster reliability management with Nomad-inspired scheduling, lifecycle, recovery, drain, and service-discovery controls.
name: Demo: Cluster Reliability Service

product.agent_role: Cluster reliability planner, probe worker, drain rehearsal worker, and manual recovery gate.
product.benefit: This turns low-level runtime reliability features into a repeatable product demo and release verification workflow.
product.customizable_for: Two-box labs, edge worker pools, GPU clusters, service monitors, and planned maintenance drills.
product.customize: Replace node hints with real cluster nodes, add capabilities advertised by your workers, tune restart/reschedule policies, and connect real replayable workloads.
product.example: A local node and a remote spark node form a combined cluster; the blueprint rehearses spread placement, service recovery, maintenance, and drain dry-run behavior.
product.how_it_works: A service graph emits deterministic probes that describe scheduler placement, replay-safe service work, batch drain handling, and manual recovery review boundaries.
product.input: Cluster node hints, scheduling capabilities, restart/reschedule policy values, drain deadline, and optional service health requirements.
product.investor: This turns low-level runtime reliability features into a repeatable product demo and release verification workflow.
product.one_line: Use this blueprint to test and demo advanced cluster reliability management with Nomad-inspired scheduling, lifecycle, recovery, drain, and service-discovery controls.
product.output: Cluster reliability rehearsal report, scheduler plan checks, recovery policy matrix, drain runbook, and operator evidence checklist.
product.problem: Cluster reliability behavior is hard to validate from individual unit tests; operators need one compact blueprint that rehearses placement, recovery, drain, and maintenance on a small combined cluster.
runtime_features: reschedule policy with unlimited service recovery
product.simulation_type: Two-node cluster reliability rehearsal with scheduler and recovery evidence.
product.target_users: Runtime engineers, cluster operators, and reliability evaluators.

description: Use this blueprint to audit how role-specific context packets move through a multi-agent decision process and affect the final recommendation.

product.customize: Replace the synthetic audit transcript, policy text, ACL roles, memory item schemas, and final decision rubric.

product.how_it_works: Policy, evidence, risk, decision, and critic agents each receive only the context packet they are allowed to see.

description: Use this blueprint to test whether compressed working memory keeps a growing LLM workflow useful while reducing context load and cost.

product.agent_role: Context researcher, expander, challenger, compressor, briefing author.
product.benefit: State management and compression are differentiators for agent platforms moving beyond one-shot prompts.

product.customize: Change token budgets, pinned terms, memory item types, compression policy, and model-compression settings.

product.how_it_works: Agents create larger artifacts over several turns while CompileContext keeps each packet bounded and traceable.
product.input: Change token budgets, pinned terms, memory item types, compression policy, and model-compression settings.
product.investor: State management and compression are differentiators for agent platforms moving beyond one-shot prompts.
product.one_line: Use this blueprint to test whether compressed working memory keeps a growing LLM workflow useful while reducing context load and cost.
product.output: Compressed context handoff and final briefing.

description: Use this blueprint to convert requirements and vendor responses into a scored recommendation, implementation plan, and reviewable decision record.
name: Vendor Selection Advisor Assistant

product.agent_role: Vendor selection and implementation roadmap agent.
product.benefit: Vendor selection is a repeatable high-value transformation workflow that can expand from RFP copilot into implementation readiness and procurement decision operations.
product.customizable_for: ERP, CRM, cloud, cybersecurity, AI platform, robotics, outsourcing, and implementation partner selection.
product.customize: Replace mock vendors with RFP exports, security questionnaires, pricing sheets, architecture constraints, stakeholder notes, and procurement policies; adjust criteria, weights, risk rules, and roadmap phases.
product.example: A CIO team selects an AI-enabled field service platform by generating an RFP package, scoring vendors, profiling pricing, surfacing missing answers, and building an implementation roadmap.
product.how_it_works: A CIO team selects an AI-enabled field service platform by generating an RFP package, scoring vendors, profiling pricing, surfacing missing answers, and building an implementation roadmap.
product.input: Replace mock vendors with RFP exports, security questionnaires, pricing sheets, architecture constraints, stakeholder notes, and procurement policies; adjust criteria, weights, risk rules, and roadmap phases.
product.investor: Vendor selection is a repeatable high-value transformation workflow that can expand from RFP copilot into implementation readiness and procurement decision operations.
product.one_line: Use this blueprint to convert requirements and vendor responses into a scored recommendation, implementation plan, and reviewable decision record.
product.output: Vendor comparison matrix, recommendation memo, implementation roadmap, cost/risk model, process map, and negotiation questions.
product.problem: Companies need a repeatable way to turn requirements, RFP responses, pricing, security evidence, and stakeholder input into an executive vendor decision.
product.simulation_type: Vendor selection and implementation roadmap workflow.
product.target_users: CIO offices, procurement, transformation offices, private-equity operating teams, and enterprise architecture teams.
